english: The Art of War by Sun Tzu

etymology.description: The term 孫子兵法 (Sūnzǐ Bīngfǎ) refers to 'The Art of War,' an ancient Chinese military treatise. It was traditionally attributed to the military strategist 孫(孫) (Sūn, "surname Sun") 子(子) (zǐ, "master; son") whose name collectively forms 孫子 (Sūnzǐ, "Master Sun"). The surname 孫(孫) (Sūn, "surname Sun") connects him to his lineage, while 子(子) (zǐ, "master") conveys reverence and mastery. 兵(兵) (bīng, "soldier; military") emphasizes the military focus of his teachings. 法(法) (fǎ, "method; law") indicates a comprehensive systematic methodology, reflecting the structured and strategic nature of the text.
etymology.interpretation: The name 孫子 (Sūnzǐ, "Master Sun") acknowledges Sun Tzu's status as a venerated figure in military strategy. 兵法 (bīngfǎ, "military methods") signifies the strategic doctrines and tactics explained in the text, making it an authoritative guide on warfare. 'Master Sun's Military Methods' highlights the treatise's focus on strategic principles employed by military leaders.

examples.chinese: 孙子兵法(孫子兵法)是一部著名的兵书(是一部著名的兵書)。
examples.pinyin: Sūnzǐ Bīngfǎ shì yī bù zhùmíng de bīngshū.
examples.english: The Art of War is a famous military treatise.

examples.chinese: 许多商界领袖(許多商界領袖)都从孙子兵法中(都從孫子兵法中)获得灵感(獲得靈感)。
examples.pinyin: Xǔduō shāngjiè lǐngxiù dōu cóng Sūnzǐ Bīngfǎ zhōng huòdé línggǎn.
examples.english: Many business leaders draw inspiration from The Art of War.

examples.chinese: 读孙子兵法(讀孫子兵法)能提高我们的战略思维(能提高我們的戰略思維)。
examples.pinyin: Dú Sūnzǐ Bīngfǎ néng tígāo wǒmen de zhànlüè sīwéi.
examples.english: Reading The Art of War can enhance our strategic thinking.
